{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20846_1
|class_id=20846
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20846_2
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=14
|civ=17
|tech=29
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per Galaxy Core upgraded, Snail HP +30<br>Galaxy Core Upgraded: 20/20
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per Galaxy Core upgraded, Snail HP +45<br>Galaxy Core Upgraded: 20/20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Galaxy Core upgraded, Snail HP +60<br>Galaxy Core Upgraded: 20/20
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Galaxy Core upgraded, Snail HP +60<br>Galaxy Core Upgraded: 20/20
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Galaxy Core upgraded, Snail HP +60<br>Galaxy Core Upgraded: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
